dense_en: A slim woman with light skin, narrow shoulders, eyeglasses, and long straight dark hair parted at the center and falling to the lower back. She wears a light colored sleeveless dress with broad shoulder straps and a scoop neckline, built with a fitted bodice and a high waist seam below the bust that opens into a flared skirt. The dress has a short above knee to knee length hem, a tiered ruffle skirt with multiple horizontal bands, and thin darker trim outlining the tier seams. She has bare legs and flat thong sandals.

A light skinned man with short dark hair and a slim build, wearing a dark red short sleeve crew neck T-shirt with a large circular chest graphic featuring a light center, along with loose straight knee length gray shorts and dark athletic shoes with red accents.

A slim woman with medium light skin, long legs, and long dark hair worn loose. She wears a black short sleeve top with a loose draped silhouette, olive green short shorts with a drawstring waistband, and bare legs with light colored flat sandals. A large white rectangular shoulder bag is worn crossbody, with a dark strap running diagonally across her torso.

A slim man with medium skin tone, short dark hair, and a face angled downward wears a red short sleeve T-shirt, black knee length shorts with a loose straight leg, and dark sneakers with white soles, and carries a large black backpack with broad shoulder straps and a red side panel.

A man with medium skin tone, short dark hair, and a regular build wears a dark short sleeve T-shirt patterned with thin narrow horizontal stripes. He has knee length blue denim shorts in a light blue tone, a dark crossbody bag slung from the left shoulder to the right hip, and dark shoes. A white item sticks out from the right rear pocket area, and he also carries a light colored item in one hand. The overall outfit is defined by the striped dark T-shirt, the light blue denim knee length shorts, the crossbody bag resting along the right hip area, and the dark footwear.

A light skinned man with short dark hair, dark framed glasses, a regular build, and slightly broad shoulders. He also carries a large black backpack, worn with shoulder straps on both shoulders.

A young man with short dark hair, light skin, and a slim regular build wears an oversized loose light gray crew neck T-shirt with a large dark rectangular graphic across the chest and a broad black horizontal band near the lower hem. He carries a black crossbody shoulder bag with a wide strap running from his left shoulder to his right hip. He also wears black knee length shorts and athletic sneakers, with the footwear showing as red athletic shoes with white soles.

A slim, regular built man with medium skin tone and short dark hair, wearing a white short sleeve T-shirt with a dark collar area and dark trim at the sleeve ends. The shirt has a large black graphic printed in the center of the back, forming a cartoon style face design. He pairs it with green shorts that have a dark side stripe, and dark footwear. Does not wear a watch, and is not wearing a mask.

A slim woman with light skin and dark hair tied back, wearing a plain white short sleeve top and dark knee length shorts that leave her legs bare. A young woman with medium skin tone, a slim build, and long bare legs, wearing her dark hair tied back in a low ponytail. She carries a dark shoulder bag on one shoulder with the bag hanging at the hip, and she wears dark shoes, specifically black flats.

A light skinned man with short dark hair, a broad torso, and a stocky regular build, wearing a plain light gray crew neck short sleeve T-shirt with no visible graphic, loose straight dark knee length shorts, white ankle socks, and dark athletic shoes. A man with medium to dark skin tone, short dark hair, and a regular build wears a short sleeve polo shirt with a collar and short placket opening.
